title: React Components Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of React component structure, naming conventions, and composition.

questions.question: Which of the following is correct syntax for a React functional component?
What is the naming convention for React components?
What should every React component return to render in the UI?
In React, can you use a component inside another component?
options: Yes, but only if they are in the same file.
Only if they are class components.

questions.question: If you use 'export default MyComponent', how should you import it in another file?
